app.name: ɳChat — Self-Hosted Messenger
app.shortDescription: Open-source, self-hosted chat. Your data, your server.

description.en-US:
ɳChat is a fully open-source, self-hosted messaging app you deploy on your own server in minutes.

Connect to your own ɳChat server — no data goes to third-party clouds, no ads, no account required from us.

🔥 FEATURES

• Public and private channels, DMs, and group chats
• Message threads, replies, reactions, @mentions, @everyone
• Rich text editor: markdown, code blocks, links
• File sharing, images, and link previews
• Message search and pinned messages
• Read receipts, typing indicators, and online presence
• Emoji shortcuts (:smile: style)

🔒 PRIVACY

• Host on YOUR server — you own all data
• No third-party analytics or tracking
• End-to-end encryption available (E2EE, requires nself Pro)

📞 CALLS (requires nself Pro)

• Voice and video calls via LiveKit
• Screen sharing and call recording
• Incoming call notifications even when app is backgrounded

🛠️ SELF-HOSTED

ɳChat requires a backend server. Install nself on any Linux VPS, run 'nself start', and connect the app to your API endpoint.

Try it free: connect to community.nself.org on first launch.

📖 OPEN SOURCE

All client code is MIT licensed. github.com/nself-org/chat

changelogs.en-US:
• Improved call notifications on Android
• Rich text editor with @mentions and #channels
• Faster message loading
• Bug fixes and stability improvements

dataDisclosure.securityPracticesNote: All user data is stored on the user's own self-hosted server. The app does not collect or share any data with nself or third parties.
